name: read-my-screen
title: Read My Screen
description: AI screenshot and browser reader: OCR, explain errors, summarize pages, and review UI with GPT-4o, Claude, or Gemini. Use region, window, or full-screen capture; clipboard images; local files; or the active browser tab. Bring your own API keys — requests go straight to OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google.
author: erbilnas

commands.name: analyze-screen
commands.title: Read My Screen
commands.description: Main command: capture your screen (region, window, full screen, or clipboard image) or read the current browser tab as text. Vision and text models; follow-up chat; session history.

commands.name: quick-clipboard
commands.title: Quick: Clipboard Image
commands.subtitle: Read My Screen
commands.description: One shortcut: analyze the file-backed image on your clipboard with your default model — fast OCR, error help, or UI notes.

commands.name: quick-browser
commands.title: Quick: Browser Page
commands.subtitle: Read My Screen
commands.description: One shortcut: summarize or question the active browser tab (Chrome, Safari, Arc, Dia, Edge, and more) using page text.

commands.name: analyze-file
commands.title: Analyze Image File
commands.subtitle: Read My Screen
commands.description: Open a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF from disk; analyze with AI and continue the conversation in chat.

commands.name: session-history
commands.title: Session History
commands.subtitle: Read My Screen
commands.description: Reopen saved analyses (with screen thumbnails), continue chats, and manage past sessions.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API key
preferences.description: Used when an OpenAI model is selected. From platform.openai.com

preferences.name: anthropicApiKey
preferences.title: Anthropic API key
preferences.description: Used when a Claude model is selected. From console.anthropic.com

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Google Gemini API key
preferences.description: Used when a Gemini model is selected. From aistudio.google.com/apikey

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Provider and model (vision for screenshots, text for browser pages). Use the matching API key.

preferences.name: defaultPrompt
preferences.title: Default instructions
preferences.description: Pre-filled analysis instructions in the form (you can edit each run).
preferences.default: Describe what you see on the screen. Call out any text, UI elements, errors, or notable details.

preferences.name: showTokenUsage
preferences.title: Token usage
preferences.description: When the provider returns usage data, show estimated input/output tokens in toasts and the chat header.
preferences.label: Show estimated token usage

preferences.name: showEstimatedCost
preferences.title: Estimated API cost
preferences.description: Show approximate USD next to token counts using public list prices (your invoice may differ). Requires token usage to be enabled.
preferences.label: Show estimated cost (USD)
